title: Jola breaks record at national schools championships
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - Endinako Jola (17), a Grade 10 learner at Gcinubuzwe Combined School in Jansenville, broke the record of the 3 000m in a time of 08:53 to win a gold medal at the National Schools Athletic Championships held in Bloemfontein last weekend.","html":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - Endinako Jola (17), a Grade 10 learner at Gcinubuzwe Combined School in Jansenville, broke the record of the 3 000m in a time of 08:53 to win a gold medal at the National Schools Athletic Championships held in Bloemfontein last weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Jola started his athletics journey at Hobson Khanyisa Primary school in Klipplaat where he has been winning Eastern Cape colours in long distances since 2022."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Endinako (meaning \"What I can…?\") represented the Sarah Baartman district in Queenstown two weeks ago, where he continued his winning streak.","html":"Endinako (meaning \"What I can…?\") represented the Sarah Baartman district in Queenstown two weeks ago, where he continued his winning streak."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He attended the National School Athletics Championships in Bloemfontein where he claimed a second place in the 1 500m track and won his gold in the 3 000m.","html":"He attended the National School Athletics Championships in Bloemfontein where he claimed a second place in the 1 500m track and won his gold in the 3 000m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The community of Jansenville gave Jola a celebrity welcome last Sunday.","html":"The community of Jansenville gave Jola a celebrity welcome last Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His father and coach, Luthando Sikiwe, also a long distance runner, inspired and encouraged him to do track and field items.","html":"His father and coach, Luthando Sikiwe, also a long distance runner, inspired and encouraged him to do track and field items."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was hesitant at first, but in 2024 he did justice to his name, proving that he can \" (endinako).","html":"He was hesitant at first, but in 2024 he did justice to his name, proving that he can \" (endinako)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He participated in the 1 500m and 800m where he achieved podium places.","html":"He participated in the 1 500m and 800m where he achieved podium places."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The 3 000m had only the final, with no preliminary rounds,\" Endinako told the Advertiser.","html":"\"The 3 000m had only the final, with no preliminary rounds,\" Endinako told the Advertiser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"In the first two of the eight laps I did not go all out, because it was raining, so I relaxed but maintained my pace.","html":"\"In the first two of the eight laps I did not go all out, because it was raining, so I relaxed but maintained my pace."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the last five rounds, I said to myself it was time to go – I couldn't take it easy any more – and I went.","html":"In the last five rounds, I said to myself it was time to go – I couldn't take it easy any more – and I went."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the last two rounds I was alone, with one guy chasing me, but he could not catch up with me as I increased my pace.","html":"In the last two rounds I was alone, with one guy chasing me, but he could not catch up with me as I increased my pace."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I did not panic; I was supposed to run in the first lane but I ran in the second lane.","html":"\"I did not panic; I was supposed to run in the first lane but I ran in the second lane."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The danger of running in lane one in a pack like that is that you can be easily pushed off the track, and could be disqualified, so I ran in the second lane to keep myself safe.","html":"The danger of running in lane one in a pack like that is that you can be easily pushed off the track, and could be disqualified, so I ran in the second lane to keep myself safe."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I was not tired but managed to keep the pace. I was determined to win that race and I did,\" he said.","html":"I was not tired but managed to keep the pace. I was determined to win that race and I did,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
